content: agent1: implementing custom tensor adapter support for XGrammarLogitsProcessor. Files: outlines/backends/xgrammar.py, outlines/processors/base_logits_processor.py, outlines/processors/tensor_adapters/__init__.py. Will ping if I touch anything else.

ack, I already edited outlines/backends/xgrammar.py: XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ is now (compiled_grammar, tensor_library_name='torch', custom_adapter=None) and calls super().__init__(tensor_library_name, custom_adapter). I did NOT touch process_logits or reset bodies. All 3 XGrammarBackend factory methods gained (tensor_library_name='torch', custom_adapter=None) kwargs and pass them to XGrammarLogitsProcessor(compiled_grammar, tensor_library_name, custom_adapter) positionally. I also edited outlines/processors/base_logits_processor.py (OutlinesLogitsProcessor.__init__ now takes custom_adapter param) and outlines/processors/tensor_adapters/__init__.py (exports TensorAdapter). Since we both touch __init__ and the 3 factory methods, please add track_memory_usage as an additional kwarg after mine (positionally last) rather than reordering, and merge into the current __init__ body rather than replacing it wholesale. I'm about to finalize my patch - let me know when you've merged so we don't stomp each other.
